title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, April 19 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 20/04/2022
Image reference: 2022-04-20_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-april-19-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Capesize Bulkers have firmed. Capesize Aquaproud (178,100 DWT, Jun 2009, Shanghai Waigaoqiao Shipbuilding) sold to Alpha Bulkers Shipmanagement for USD 26.50 mil, VV Value USD 25.79 mil - DD Passed. Capesize Aquascope (174,000 DWT, Nov 2006, Shanghai Waigaoqiao Shipbuilding) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 19.70 mil, VV Value USD 19.32 mil - BWTS Fitted.
